[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ _builder_version=”4.27.2″ _module_preset=”default” background_color=”#f3f3f3″ global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_row column_structure=”1_2,1_2″ _builder_version=”4.27.2″ _module_preset=”default” background_color=”#FFFFFF” width_tablet=”” width_phone=”90%” width_last_edited=”on|phone” max_width=”80%” max_width_tablet=”80%” max_width_phone=”90%” max_width_last_edited=”on|phone” box_shadow_style=”preset1″ box_shadow_color=”#C7CCD8″ global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”1_2″ _builder_version=”4.27.2″ _module_preset=”default” custom_padding=”5%||5%|20px|true|false” custom_padding_tablet=”5%||5%|20px|true|false” custom_padding_phone=”||||true|false” custom_padding_last_edited=”on|phone” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_text module_class=”dct_title_v3″ _builder_version=”4.27.2″ text_font=”||||||||” header_2_text_color=”#000000″ header_2_font_size=”35px” header_4_font=”||||||||” header_4_text_color=”#000000″ global_colors_info=”{}”]

Elevating brands through captivating visuals, we’re your premier Graphic Designing Company

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.2″ _module_preset=”default” custom_margin=”-20px||||false|false” custom_padding=”||||false|false” global_colors_info=”{}”]

Transforming concepts into compelling visual narratives, we are your go-to graphic designing company.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.2″ _module_preset=”default” custom_margin=”-20px||||false|false” global_colors_info=”{}”]

Ready to Transform Your Brand Identity?

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.2″ _module_preset=”default” custom_margin=”-20px||||false|false” global_colors_info=”{}”]

Are you prepared to elevate your brand’s visual identity to new heights? Look no further than Design Flare, your premier graphic designing company in Bangalore! Our team of expert graphic designers is dedicated to crafting captivating visuals that resonate with your audience and leave a lasting impression. Whether you’re in need of eye-catching logos, stunning marketing materials, or engaging social media graphics, we’ve got you covered. Let us breathe life into your brand and captivate your audience with our top-notch graphic design solutions. Get started with Design Flare today and watch your brand shine like never before!

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_button button_url=”https://api.whatsapp.com/message/XHAQM2L2VQDKH1?autoload=1&app_absent=0″ url_new_window=”on” button_text=”Whatsapp” _builder_version=”4.27.0″ custom_button=”on” button_text_size=”18px” button_text_color=”#FFFFFF” button_bg_color=”#B6131D” button_border_width=”0px” button_icon=”||fa||400″ custom_margin=”5px||||false|false” custom_padding=”|10%||5%|false|false” global_colors_info=”{}” button_text_color__hover_enabled=”on|hover” button_text_color__hover=”#ffffff” button_border_color__hover_enabled=”on|hover” button_border_color__hover=”#232323″ button_bg_color__hover_enabled=”on|hover” button_bg_color__hover=”#000000″ button_bg_enable_color__hover=”on”][/et_pb_button][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type=”1_2″ _builder_version=”4.27.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_code _builder_version=”4.27.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”] [/et_pb_code][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ _builder_version=”4.27.2″ background_color=”rgba(0,0,0,0.2)” background_image=”https://designflash.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/Design-process-bg.jpg” background_repeat=”repeat” background_blend=”darken” custom_padding=”15px|||||” custom_css_free_form=”@media screen and (max-width: 767px) {|| .dct_m_timeline_v1 .dct_timeline_v1 .et_pb_blurb_content, .dct_m_timeline_v1 .dct_m_timeline_v1 .dct_timeline_v1:nth-child(even) .et_pb_blurb_content {|| background-color: inherit;}}” saved_tabs=”all” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_row use_custom_gutter=”on” make_equal=”on” _builder_version=”4.27.0″ max_width=”1100px” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”4_4″ _builder_version=”4.16″ global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_text module_class=”dct_title_v3″ _builder_version=”4.27.2″ text_font=”||||||||” header_2_text_color=”#FFFFFF” header_4_font=”||||||||” header_4_text_color=”#FFFFFF” global_colors_info=”{}”]

design Flash

What Makes us stand apart

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row module_class=”dct_m_timeline_v1 dark” _builder_version=”4.27.0″ global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”4_4″ _builder_version=”4.16″ global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_blurb title=”Unmatched Creativity” use_icon=”on” font_icon=”||divi||400″ module_class=”dct_timeline_v1″ _builder_version=”4.27.2″ header_font=”Poppins||||||||” body_font=”Rubik||||||||” background_color=”RGBA(255,255,255,0)” animation=”off” header_text_color_tablet=”” header_text_color_phone=”#FFFFFF” header_text_color_last_edited=”on|phone” body_text_color_phone=”#000000″ body_text_color_last_edited=”off|phone” background_last_edited=”on|phone” background_enable_color_phone=”off” custom_css_main_element=”background-color:none !important;” global_colors_info=”{}”]

Creativity is our cornerstone. From our graphic design agency’s inception, we’ve been known for pushing boundaries and exploring new possibilities in every project we undertake. Whether it’s creative logo design, innovative branding, or captivating visuals, our team thrives on delivering designs that stand out from the crowd.

[/et_pb_blurb][et_pb_blurb title=”Strategic Approach” use_icon=”on” font_icon=”||divi||400″ module_class=”dct_timeline_v1″ _builder_version=”4.27.2″ header_font=”Poppins||||||||” body_font=”Rubik||||||||” animation=”off” global_colors_info=”{}”]

We don’t just focus on aesthetics – we design with purpose. Our strategic approach sets us apart from the rest. We delve deep into understanding your brand’s identity, target audience, and objectives to ensure that every design we create serves a strategic purpose. Whether it’s logo design business or comprehensive branding services, our designs are crafted to drive meaningful results.

[/et_pb_blurb][et_pb_blurb title=”Collaborative Approach” use_icon=”on” font_icon=”||divi||400″ module_class=”dct_timeline_v1″ _builder_version=”4.27.2″ header_font=”Poppins||||||||” body_font=”Rubik||||||||” animation=”off” global_colors_info=”{}”]

We believe that the best designs are born from collaboration, which is why we work closely with our clients every step of the way. From brainstorming creative ideas to refining concepts and incorporating feedback, our collaborative process ensures that your vision is brought to life in the most effective and impactful way possible.

[/et_pb_blurb][et_pb_blurb title=”Attention to Detail” use_icon=”on” font_icon=”||fa||400″ module_class=”dct_timeline_v1″ _builder_version=”4.27.2″ header_font=”Poppins||||||||” body_font=”Rubik||||||||” animation=”off” global_colors_info=”{}”]

We understand that the devil is in the details. That’s why we pay meticulous attention to every aspect of your design – from color choices to typography and everything in between. Whether it’s business logo design services or intricate branding projects, our attention to detail ensures that every element of your design is carefully considered and flawlessly executed.

[/et_pb_blurb][et_pb_blurb title=”Responsive Communication” use_icon=”on” font_icon=”||divi||400″ module_class=”dct_timeline_v1″ _builder_version=”4.27.2″ header_font=”Poppins||||||||” body_font=”Rubik||||||||” animation=”off” global_colors_info=”{}”]

Communication is key to a successful partnership, which is why we prioritize responsive communication. We understand the importance of keeping our clients informed and involved throughout the design process. Whether you have questions, feedback, or ideas to share, we’re always here to listen and respond promptly.

[/et_pb_blurb][et_pb_blurb title=”Commitment to Excellence” use_icon=”on” font_icon=”||divi||400″ module_class=”dct_timeline_v1″ _builder_version=”4.27.2″ header_font=”Poppins||||||||” body_font=”Rubik||||||||” animation=”off” global_colors_info=”{}”]

Excellence isn’t just a goal – it’s our standard.  We’re committed to delivering nothing but the highest quality designs and service to our clients. Whether it’s logo design & branding or comprehensive graphic design solutions, we’re dedicated to exceeding expectations and delivering results that make an impact.

[/et_pb_blurb][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ _builder_version=”4.27.2″ _module_preset=”default” background_color=”#F3F3F3″ custom_padding=”0px||0px||false|false” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_row _builder_version=”4.27.2″ _module_preset=”default” custom_padding=”||0px||false|false” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”4_4″ _builder_version=”4.27.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_text module_class=”dct_title_v3″ _builder_version=”4.27.2″ text_font=”||||||||” header_2_text_color=”#000000″ header_4_font=”||||||||” header_4_text_color=”#000000″ global_colors_info=”{}”]

Services

Graphic Design Services We Offer

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row column_structure=”1_3,1_3,1_3″ use_custom_gutter=”on” gutter_width=”2″ _builder_version=”4.27.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”1_3″ _builder_version=”4.27.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][difl_flipbox title_front=”Logo Design” title_back=”Logo Design” content_back=”

Your logo is the face of your brand. We create unique, memorable logos that capture the essence of your business and make a lasting impression on your audience.

” change_view=”on” fb_btn_button_url=”https://designflash.in/logo-design-services-in-bangalore/” fb_btn_button_url_new_window=”1″ image_front_image=”https://designflash.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/logo-designing.jpg” image_front_image_align=”center” fb_background_bgcolor=”#232323″ fb_back_background_bgcolor=”#232323″ title_front_padding=”20px||20px||true|false” title_back_padding=”30px||||false|false” text_back_padding=”|20px||20px|false|true” _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”default” title_font=”||||||||” title_text_align=”center” title_text_color=”#FFFFFF” title_back_text_align=”center” title_back_text_color=”#FFFFFF” content_back_text_color=”#FFFFFF” border_radii=”on|10px|10px|10px|10px” box_shadow_style_front=”preset1″ box_shadow_color_front=”#C7CCD8″ box_shadow_style_back=”preset1″ box_shadow_color_back=”#C7CCD8″ global_colors_info=”{}”][/difl_flipbox][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type=”1_3″ _builder_version=”4.27.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][difl_flipbox title_front=”Web Graphics & Banners” title_back=”Web Graphics & Banners” content_back=”

Enhance your digital presence with web-friendly designs. We create engaging web graphics, banners, and icons that improve user experience and align with your brand’s aesthetic.

” fb_btn_button_url_new_window=”1″ image_front_image=”https://designflash.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/web-graphics-and-banners.jpg” image_front_image_align=”center” fb_background_bgcolor=”#232323″ fb_back_background_bgcolor=”#232323″ title_front_padding=”20px||20px||true|false” title_back_padding=”30px||||false|false” text_back_padding=”|20px||20px|false|true” _builder_version=”4.27.2″ _module_preset=”default” title_font=”||||||||” title_text_align=”center” title_text_color=”#FFFFFF” title_back_text_align=”center” title_back_text_color=”#FFFFFF” content_back_text_color=”#FFFFFF” border_radii=”on|10px|10px|10px|10px” box_shadow_style_front=”preset1″ box_shadow_color_front=”#C7CCD8″ box_shadow_style_back=”preset1″ box_shadow_color_back=”#C7CCD8″ global_colors_info=”{}”][/difl_flipbox][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type=”1_3″ _builder_version=”4.27.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][difl_flipbox title_front=”Social Media Graphics” title_back=”Social Media Graphics” content_back=”

Capture your audience’s attention with visually stunning graphics for Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, and more. We design posts, ads, covers, and stories that increase engagement and brand visibility.

” fb_btn_button_url_new_window=”1″ image_front_image=”https://designflash.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/Social-media-graphics.jpg” image_front_image_align=”center” fb_background_bgcolor=”#232323″ fb_back_background_bgcolor=”#232323″ title_front_padding=”20px||20px||true|false” title_back_padding=”30px||||false|false” text_back_padding=”|20px||20px|false|true” _builder_version=”4.27.2″ _module_preset=”default” title_font=”||||||||” title_text_align=”center” title_text_color=”#FFFFFF” title_back_text_align=”center” title_back_text_color=”#FFFFFF” content_back_text_color=”#FFFFFF” hover_enabled=”0″ border_radii=”on|10px|10px|10px|10px” box_shadow_style_front=”preset1″ box_shadow_color_front=”#C7CCD8″ box_shadow_style_back=”preset1″ box_shadow_color_back=”#C7CCD8″ global_colors_info=”{}” sticky_enabled=”0″][/difl_flipbox][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ admin_label=”faq” module_id=”dct_faq_v1″ _builder_version=”4.27.0″ background_color=”#f3f3f3″ custom_padding=”20px||0px||false|false” custom_css_free_form=”#dct_faq_v1 .et_pb_accordion:before{|| background:none;||}||#dct_faq_v1 .et_pb_accordion .et_pb_toggle h5.et_pb_toggle_title:after{|| border:none;||}” saved_tabs=”all” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_row use_custom_gutter=”on” gutter_width=”2″ _builder_version=”4.27.0″ global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”4_4″ _builder_version=”4.16″ global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_text module_class=”dct_title_v3″ _builder_version=”4.27.0″ text_font=”||||||||” header_4_font=”||||||||” global_colors_info=”{}”]

Quick Tips

You can learn more from our asked questions

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_accordion _builder_version=”4.27.2″ toggle_font=”Poppins||||||||” closed_toggle_font=”Poppins||||||||” body_font=”||||||||” custom_padding=”||||false|false” custom_css_free_form=”#dct_faq_v1 .et_pb_accordion .et_pb_toggle h5.et_pb_toggle_title:after {display:none;}||#dct_faq_v1 .et_pb_accordion .et_pb_toggle {margin-left:0px!important;}” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_accordion_item title=”What types of graphic design services do you offer?” open=”on” _builder_version=”4.27.2″ global_colors_info=”{}”]

We offer a full range of graphic design services, including logo design, branding, print design, social media graphics, web banners, infographics, packaging design, and more. Whether you need digital or print solutions, we’ve got you covered.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title=”How long does it take to complete a graphic design project?” _builder_version=”4.27.2″ global_colors_info=”{}” open=”off”]

The timeline for each project depends on its complexity. Logo designs typically take 1-2 weeks, while larger branding or web design projects may take 3-4 weeks. We work closely with you to ensure timely delivery.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title=”Can you create a custom design based on my brand guidelines?” _builder_version=”4.27.2″ global_colors_info=”{}” open=”off”]

Yes, we specialize in creating designs that align with your brand identity. If you have existing guidelines, we will ensure all our designs are consistent with your brand’s aesthetic and tone.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title=”How much do your graphic design services cost?” _builder_version=”4.27.2″ global_colors_info=”{}” open=”off”]

Our pricing varies depending on the scope of the project. We offer competitive rates and can provide a custom quote after discussing your specific design needs. Contact us for more details.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title=”Can you help with rebranding?” _builder_version=”4.27.2″ global_colors_info=”{}” open=”off”]

Definitely! Whether you’re looking to refresh your current brand or undergo a complete rebranding, we can assist with everything from new logos to updated brand collateral and marketing materials.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][/et_pb_accordion][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section]
